# App-store rating cluster

## Signal layer

`credibility/discovery`

## Pattern to test

review/rating surges manipulate app quality signal.

## Graph representation

reviewer-app graph.

## Useful metrics

review burst, version-level rating shifts, country entropy.

## Verification question

Does the observed traction signal look more like independent behaviour or repeated coordinated/synthetic signalling?

## Evidence to combine

- network structure
- temporal bursts
- content similarity
- disclosure or incentive evidence
- actor history
- external reporting or platform/regulator evidence
- downstream quality of demand

## Examples / source anchors

Apple discovery fraud; Google Play policy.

## Safe wording

"The observed pattern is consistent with `app-store rating cluster` risk indicators under the tested model. This does not by itself prove intent, fraud, or illegality."
